header_message:
That's it for the demo. Your journey to find the glohm has only begun and its mystery lies much deeper. When the full version is complete, you'll enjoy:

14 playable stages
Four playable characters
The full story

Like the game so far? Follow us on social media and we'll let you know when it's complete.
Website: https://drillimation.com/
